title: Macan villager
description:
Replacing a villager with a macan.
You're probably tired of hearing the villagers mumbling, but this pack will fix that. Added 25 phrases and 1 sound when you take damage.
body:
replaces texture and sounds with macana(25 idle sounds and 1 damage sound) 
in the future we will update this mod and maybe add more phrases(but I can't promise about this)
I hope you don't like the pack and you will beat the villagers until they lose their pulse
